title: Verify Pause Trial Functionality and UI Update
description: Test that a user can successfully pause their trial and that the homepage widget and Trial Corner hub reflect the 'Paused' state.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and part of the Trial Corner cohort.

steps.description: 3. In the confirmation pop-up, click 'Pause' again.
4. Verify the Trial Corner hub UI updates to a 'Paused' state and content sections become locked.
6. Verify the homepage widget now shows a 'Paused' status.

expected_result: The user's trial is paused. All relevant UI components reflect this new state, and content access is revoked. A 'pause-clicked' event is fired.
